about.title: Trusted Data Experts Since 2006
about.text: DataLead Consulting is a leading data management firm specializing in enterprise database administration, data platform deployment, and advanced analytics. With certifications across Oracle, MS-SQL, PostgreSQL and open-source technologies, we serve government agencies, banks, and enterprises.
